commit_sha_note: This is the source baseline used to generate the release metadata. The immutable final tag target is recorded by Git and in the issue #19 handoff comment after tag push.

fresh_clone_status.scope: Fresh clone from GitHub at the final tag, followed by documented bundle rebuild, five-run replay, full unittest suite, and nix flake check.
fresh_clone_status.note: The committed manifest records stable release-bundle digests. Fresh-clone regenerated bundle digests are timestamp-dependent and are recorded in the issue #19 and coordinator handoff comments.
